text: Found 8 key Rust source files defining the type inference engine in sg-evals/rust--01f6ddf7. (1) compiler/rustc_infer/src/infer/mod.rs defines InferCtxt (line 231), the main inference context holding type/region/const unification tables, plus InferCtxtInner (line 89, mutable state including type_variable_storage, const_unification_storage, region_constraint_storage) and InferCtxtBuilder (line 508, builder pattern via TyCtxt::infer_ctxt()). (2) compiler/rustc_infer/src/infer/type_variable.rs defines TypeVariableOrigin (line 94, tracks span and param_def_id for each type variable), TypeVariableStorage (line 58, backend holding values IndexVec and eq_relations UnificationTable), TypeVariableTable (line 87, accessor with undo log), and TypeVariableValue (line 108, Known{Ty} or Unknown{UniverseIndex}). (3) compiler/rustc_hir_typeck/src/fn_ctxt/mod.rs defines FnCtxt (line 44), the function-level type checker storing body_id, param_env, ret_coercion, diverges tracking, and a reference to TypeckRootCtxt. FnCtxt method implementations are in _impl.rs, argument checking in checks.rs. (4) Supporting files: context.rs implements the InferCtxtLike trait bridge, resolve.rs handles inference variable resolution, relate/mod.rs implements type relation (subtyping/equality) operations.
